_README: This is module 10's own config. Edit it, drop your PDF + MP3 in this folder, then from the self-paced/ folder run: python3 ../build-modules.py  (or run build-modules.py from the repo root). To publish: set status to 'live' and fill youtube/pdf/audio.

_fields.title: Module title
_fields.subtitle: One short theme line
_fields.date: Publish date, e.g. '6 Jun 2026' (blank if coming soon)
_fields.youtube: YouTube video ID only (the part after ?v=)
_fields.pdf: PDF filename in this folder, or blank
_fields.audio: Audio filename in this folder's audio/ folder, or blank
_fields.description: Longer paragraph for the About section

title: AWS Cost Management and Billing
subtitle: avoiding the big bills
